theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 5: Luxury mixed with Linear/Cursor SaaS Aesthetics
theme_and_archetype.reasoning: The application is an AI command center that demands high-fidelity, startup-quality visuals akin to Linear, Vercel, and Perplexity. Deep navy base gives it depth and mystery, while subtle blue/purple glows communicate AI capability. The multi-layered glassmorphism creates a premium, high-tech interface.

background_style.description: Deep navy base layered with soft radial gradients, subtle grid pattern, and noise texture.
background_style.css_implementation: Use a fixed div with bg-[#0A0F1C]. Add two large fixed blurred absolute circles (e.g. bg-blue-600/10 and bg-purple-600/10) with blur-[120px]. Add a subtle CSS grid background pattern overlay. Add an SVG noise overlay (mix-blend-overlay, opacity-20) using a data URI SVG noise filter.

glassmorphism_rules.panel: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/[0.02] border border-white/[0.05] rounded-2xl shadow-[0_8px_32px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.36)] ring-1 ring-inset ring-white/[0.02]
glassmorphism_rules.hover_state: hover:bg-white/[0.04] hover:border-white/[0.1] hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_16px_40px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] transition-all duration-300 ease-out

components.GlassCard: Use generic glassmorphism panel classes. Must have inner padding (p-6 or p-8).
components.MetricTile: GlassCard + Large Metric + Soft Trend Arrow (e.g. +12% in green-400) + Colored Icon Container.
components.GlowButton: bg-white/[0.05] border border-white/10 rounded-lg px-4 py-2 text-sm text-white hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-blue-500/50 hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(59,130,246,0.4)] transition-all
components.GradientBadge: bg-gradient-to-r from-blue-500/20 to-purple-500/20 border border-blue-500/30 text-blue-200 text-xs px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full font-medium
components.IconContainer: w-10 h-10 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-b from-white/10 to-transparent border border-white/10 group-hover:border-white/20 transition-colors

layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed, w-64, floating glass panel with m-4 rounded-2xl. Animated active indicator (a 2px vertical blue bar or soft background highlight).
layout_and_spacing.topbar: Sticky glass header, backdrop-blur-md bg-[#0A0F1C]/70 border-b border-white/10. Logo clickable to home. Workspace info dropdown.

pages_strategy.Dashboard: Executive command center. Top: 3-4 MetricTiles (Exec Summary). Middle: Bento grid. span-8 for Top Issues interactive cards. span-4 for Vertical activity timeline. Engineering Tickets in bottom span-full.
pages_strategy.Analysis: Hero page with clear section separation using subtle border lines. Sticky summary card on right (span-4). Left side (span-8) has analysis blocks with smooth reveal animations, color-coded severity badges.
pages_strategy.Reports: Grid of Export Cards. Not standard buttons. Cards with icon, title, description, preview, and an elegant download button inside.
pages_strategy.Sources: Import reviews interface with a magical 'AI demo data loader' (shimmer effect, ascii or tech loader animation).
pages_strategy.Settings: AI Provider Manager. List or grid of connected models (OpenAI, Anthropic) with status toggles.
pages_strategy.Connectors: Grid of integration sources (Slack, Zendesk). Use react-icons.

icons.usage: Use with stroke-width 1.5. Wrap inside IconContainer for premium look.

testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive cards (e.g. data-testid='sidebar-link-dashboard').

image_urls.description: Elegant portrait of a young male professional for the topbar workspace info avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the fonts `Outfit` and `Geist` are imported via Google Fonts or standard imports in `index.css`.
Implement the background strictly in the root layout (or App.js) so it stays fixed behind all routes. Include radial gradients, noise filter, and subtle grid.
Replace generic components with the defined `GlassCard`, `MetricTile`, `GlowButton`, `GradientBadge` definitions.

Do not use Shadcn for the main marketing/dashboard wrapper layouts; stick to pure Tailwind to achieve the highly specific Linear-style glassmorphism. You can use Shadcn for complex logic (Dialogs, Dropdowns, DatePicker).
Implement the floating sidebar by giving it `m-4`, `h-[calc(100vh-32px)]`, and absolute/fixed positioning, adjusting the main content margin accordingly.
Do not output HTML string as JSON, make sure these rules are implemented exactly using actual React JS (.js) components.
